html:
Exclusive to:

EmptyPicture

The Empty Frame is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced within the From Beyond updates. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter or Carpentry Filter with 2 Logs and 2 Twigs and requires a Sawhorse to prototype.

It can be placed on a Wooden Table. By placing an item near an Empty Frame, the player can draw that item on it once by using a Feather Pencil.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Distinguished Bewitched Border Issued for free on the eve of Halloween in 2023

Exclusive to:
EmptyPicture
“I should draw something in this.”
–Wilson, when examining an Empty Frame
“My burning desire isn't to draw.”
–Willow, when examining an Empty Frame
“Is picture of nothing!”
–Wolfgang, when examining an Empty Frame
“Leave it.”
–Wendy, when examining an Empty Frame
“IT'S SIMPLE. ELEGANT. I THINK I UNDERSTAND ART”
–WX-78, when examining an Empty Frame
“All art begins with a blank page.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an Empty Frame
“It ain't much to look at with no picture in it.”
–Woodie, when examining an Empty Frame
“If only life were that simple.”
–Maxwell, when examining an Empty Frame
“I shall paint it with the blood of mine enemies."”
–Wigfrid, when examining an Empty Frame
“We don't feel like painting right now.”
–Webber, when examining an Empty Frame
“My art is done in the kitchen.”
–Warly, when examining an Empty Frame
“Nothing inside”
–Wormwood, when examining an Empty Frame
“That frame looks kinda plain with nothin' in it.”
–Winona, when examining an Empty Frame
“What a shame, just an empty frame.”
–Wortox, when examining an Empty Frame
“Glurgh. It blank and boring!”
–Wurt, when examining an Empty Frame
“Woby, wanna do a pawprint painting?”
–Walter, when examining an Empty Frame
“Is this a commentary on predestination?”
–Wanda, when examining an Empty Frame
“It's beautiful.”
–Wilson, when examining a Picture Frame
“It's fine.”
–Willow, when examining a Picture Frame
“Is art!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Picture Frame
“It will be worth more after the artist dies.”
–Wendy, when examining a Picture Frame
“IT'S RUINED”
–WX-78, when examining a Picture Frame
“Sure. Why not?”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Picture Frame
“Looks pretty realistic, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining a Picture Frame
“Uninspired.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Picture Frame
“The work of a child, no doubt.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Picture Frame
“We can paint better.”
–Webber, when examining a Picture Frame
“It's fine.”
–Warly, when examining a Picture Frame
“Huh? Not real!”
–Wormwood, when examining a Picture Frame
“One of them highbrow "still life" pieces, huh?”
–Winona, when examining a Picture Frame
“A limited edition artist's rendition!”
–Wortox, when examining a Picture Frame
“It hard to draw with claws...”
–Wurt, when examining a Picture Frame
“Is it upside down?”
–Walter, when examining a Picture Frame
“Looks like it was done in no time at all.”
–Wanda, when examining a Picture Frame
The Empty Frame is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced within the From Beyond updates. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter or Carpentry Filter with 2 Logs and 2 Twigs and requires a Sawhorse to prototype.
It can be placed on a Wooden Table. By placing an item near an Empty Frame, the player can draw that item on it once by using a Feather Pencil.
